description_long: This is a wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved skating surface with vertical transitions on both ends, flanked by sturdy wooden sidewalls. Safety railings made of light-colored wood run along the top edges, providing protection for users on the platform. The exterior is decorated with various graffiti, musical notes, and stickers, giving it a vibrant, urban aesthetic. The ramp includes two flat platforms at each end, one of which displays a yellow circular graphic and the other a black-and-white 'SKATE' sign. The overall design is robust and functional, intended for skateboarding, BMX, or scooter tricks.
description: A wooden half-pipe skate ramp with safety railings, graffiti, and urban-themed decorations, designed for skateboarding and similar activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face of the ramp with musical note graffiti and a 'MUSIC' tag, plus the safety railings and the curved skating surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the half-pipe, both end platforms, and a large yellow graphic on the left platform, with visible graffiti on the inner walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more graffiti, including a large stylized tag and several stickers, as well as the opposite platform with a 'SKATE' sign.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the spiral graffiti on the left, the yellow graphic on the right platform, and the smooth curvature of the ramp.
